title: inula candida subsp. candida
intro: Inula candida subsp. candida, also known as elecampane, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Inula candida subsp. candida include its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, reduce inflammation, and support the digestive system. Inula candida subsp. candida can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or syrup, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
